Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The results show significant renal impairment (markedly elevated creatinine, proteinuria, low urine specific gravity), mild hypoglycemia, mild metabolic acidosis (low CO₂, high chloride), and elevated ALT suggesting possible hepatic involvement. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, protein, glucose, ketones, bilirubin) further support renal dysfunction and possible tubular injury. Prompt nephrology and further hepatic evaluation are recommended.
